result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  gitrelease.cli <release-type> [<version>] [command] [options]

Arguments:
  <BuildNumber|Custom|Major|Minor|Patch>  Specify the release type
  <version>                               Specify the release version

Options:
  -r, --root <root>                                        Specify the root folder if the current executing directory is not a intended folder [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-git-release-1.29.1-83583770b7bf47f7b97a72340b48de1d]
  -d, --dry-run                                            Runs a command dry without crating a tag and a commit. [default: False]
  -i, --ignore-dirty                                       Runs a command dry without crating a tag and a commit. [default: False]
  -c, --skip-changelog                                     Specify if changelog creation should be skipped. [default: False]
  --changelog-character-limit <changelog-character-limit>  Specify the limit of characters limit for changelog file (strictly implemented for azure dev-ops limit of 5000 characters). [default: 0]
  --changelog-filename <changelog-filename>                Specify the changelog filename. [default: CHANGELOG.md]
  --changelog-type <FirstTime|Incremental>                 Specify the changelog type. [default: Incremental]
  -t, --skip-tag                                           Specify if tag creation should skipped [default: False]
  -p, --pre-release-tag <pre-release-tag>                  Any pre release tap you'd like to add to the version.
  --append-string <append-string>                          Specify the string you'd like to append at the end. It will only be appended in Incremental changelog type. []
  -s, --skip-sign                                          Indicates to skip signing of the commit. [default: False]
  --version                                                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                           Show help and usage information


Commands:
  get-version, gv  Gets the current versions used by repositories.
  init             Initialized the repo for git-release workflow

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  gitrelease.cli <release-type> [<version>] [command] [options]

Arguments:
  <BuildNumber|Custom|Major|Minor|Patch>  Specify the release type
  <version>                               Specify the release version

Options:
  -r, --root <root>                                        Specify the root folder if the current executing directory is not a intended folder [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-git-release-1.29.1-83583770b7bf47f7b97a72340b48de1d]
  -d, --dry-run                                            Runs a command dry without crating a tag and a commit. [default: False]
  -i, --ignore-dirty                                       Runs a command dry without crating a tag and a commit. [default: False]
  -c, --skip-changelog                                     Specify if changelog creation should be skipped. [default: False]
  --changelog-character-limit <changelog-character-limit>  Specify the limit of characters limit for changelog file (strictly implemented for azure dev-ops limit of 5000 characters). [default: 0]
  --changelog-filename <changelog-filename>                Specify the changelog filename. [default: CHANGELOG.md]
  --changelog-type <FirstTime|Incremental>                 Specify the changelog type. [default: Incremental]
  -t, --skip-tag                                           Specify if tag creation should skipped [default: False]
  -p, --pre-release-tag <pre-release-tag>                  Any pre release tap you'd like to add to the version.
  --append-string <append-string>                          Specify the string you'd like to append at the end. It will only be appended in Incremental changelog type. []
  -s, --skip-sign                                          Indicates to skip signing of the commit. [default: False]
  --version                                                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                           Show help and usage information


Commands:
  get-version, gv  Gets the current versions used by repositories.
  init             Initialized the repo for git-release workflow

result.stdout:
Description:
  Gets the current versions used by repositories.

Usage:
  gitrelease.cli <release-type> [<version>] get-version [options]

Arguments:
  <BuildNumber|Custom|Major|Minor|Patch>  Specify the release type
  <version>                               Specify the release version

Options:
  -t, --platform <platform>  Gets version for specific platform. [default: package]
  -r, --root <root>          Specify the root folder if the current executing directory is not a intended folder [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-git-release-1.29.1-83583770b7bf47f7b97a72340b48de1d]
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Initialized the repo for git-release workflow

Usage:
  gitrelease.cli <release-type> [<version>] init [options]

Arguments:
  <BuildNumber|Custom|Major|Minor|Patch>  Specify the release type
  <version>                               Specify the release version

Options:
  -r, --root <root>        Specify the root folder if the current executing directory is not a intended folder [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-git-release-1.29.1-83583770b7bf47f7b97a72340b48de1d]
  -v, --version <version>  Select in case the project is not a xamarin project. [default: 0.0.0]
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information
